segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What was the danger to the villages after the fire?

translations.zh-Hans: 大火之后，村庄面临什么危险？

segments.text: Firemen had been fighting the forest fire for nearly three weeks before they could get it under control.

translations.zh-Hans: 消防队员与森林大火搏斗了近三个星期，才把火势控制住。

segments.text: A short time before, great trees had covered the countryside for miles around.

translations.zh-Hans: 不久以前，参天大树还覆盖着方圆数英里的乡野。

segments.text: Now, smoke still rose up from the warm ground over the desolate hills.

translations.zh-Hans: 如今，在荒凉的山丘上，温热的地面仍冒着烟。

segments.text: Winter was coming on, and the hills threatened the surrounding villages with destruction.

translations.zh-Hans: 冬天即将来临，这些山丘威胁着周围村庄的安全。

segments.text: For heavy rain would not only wash away the soil, but would cause serious floods as well.

translations.zh-Hans: 因为大雨不仅会冲走土壤，还会引发严重的洪水。

segments.text: When the fire had at last been put out, the forest authorities ordered several tons of a special type of grass seed which would grow quickly.

translations.zh-Hans: 大火终于扑灭后，林业部门订购了数吨能迅速生长的特种草籽。

segments.text: The seed was sprayed over the ground in huge quantities by airplanes.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机把大量种子喷撒在地面上。

segments.text: The planes had been planting seed for nearly a month when it began to rain.

translations.zh-Hans: 飞机播种了将近一个月后，天开始下雨。

segments.text: By then, however, in many places the grass had already taken root.

translations.zh-Hans: 不过到那时，许多地方的草已经生了根。

segments.text: In place of the great trees which had been growing there for centuries, patches of green had begun to appear in the blackened soil.

translations.zh-Hans: 原先生长了数百年参天大树的地方，焦黑的土地上已开始出现片片绿色。
